title: Ingersoll Rand (IR) Gains From Business Strength, Risks Persist
text: Ingersoll Rand (IR) benefits from strength across its businesses, solid product offerings and acquired assets. However, the softness of its life sciences business is concerning.

title: Why Is Ingersoll (IR) Up 8.9% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Ingersoll (IR) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
